specs.section_path: 15-Layer Summary Table > 4.1 The Cosmic Algorithm: HPC & Active Inference > Integrative Mechanisms: The Computational and Physical Synthesis > III. Information Flow Dynamics (ILIT) > 2. Compression and Meaning (Information Geometry):
source_formulae: P0R03233: As information flows upward, it is compressed (Rate-Distortion Theory). Meaning is generated when information flow reduces uncertainty, proportional to the reduction in the Kullback-Leibler divergence between prior and posterior beliefs. Symbols (L7) act as geometric operators that rotate the information trajectory to align with archetypal structures (L11), minimising distortion and maximising meaning.
